channel.title: Discretization parameter optimization on GrammarViz
channel.description: Recent content in Discretization parameter optimization on GrammarViz

item.title: SAX discretization parameters optimization
item.description: An example of finding optimal discretization parameters for motif and discord discovery using GrammarViz 3.0 GUI.

item.title: SAX discretization parameters optimization
item.description: Discusses SAX discretization parameters optimization approach implemented in GrammarViz 3.0.
